title: Chimney fire fills TVM hotel with smoke, guests evacuated safely
summary: A fire at Hotel Highland in Thampanoor, Thiruvananthapuram, on Friday evening saw a large emergency response, with fire tenders and police evacuating guests and staff amid billowing smoke.

title: Kannur nurses' strike: Union blames CITU, BMS for deadlock as talks fail again
summary: Kannur nurses' strike continues after 56 days, with talks failing due to union demands linked to broader wage hikes, strengthening hospital managements' stance against nurses' salary increase demands.

title: Man's death at Neyyatinkara Gen Hospital: Expert committee visits hospital, report to be submitted soon
summary: An expert committee will report on a man's death after alleged delayed emergency care. Security staff have been removed pending further action.

summary: Six men arrested for allegedly assaulting and humiliating three youths in Perumbavoor have been granted bail by a magistrate's court, raising concerns about vigilantism.
